subject: API Auth Failure
body: Hi Maya and team, our automated pull from the Harbor dashboard started returning 401 errors at 3 AM EST. We haven't changed our keys. Can you check if there was a platform update?

subject: Missing shipment data (PO #4490)
body: The dashboard is showing 'In Transit' for our latest raw material batch from Vietnam, but the carrier portal says it cleared customs yesterday. Why the lag?

subject: Adding new users
body: We just onboarded 4 new floor managers. I'm trying to add them to the 'Viewer' role but the invite buttons are greyed out. Is there a seat limit on our current plan?

subject: Request for custom report
body: We need a CSV export that specifically breaks down lead times by port of entry, not just by region. Is this something your team can build for us by Monday?

subject: Dashboard Loading Slow
body: Is Harbor down? The main analytics page is taking over 30 seconds to load for all our users in the Detroit office. Other sites are working fine.

subject: Billing Question
body: I just saw the invoice for October. There's a 'Data Overage' fee of $450. I don't recall being notified we were approaching our limit. Can you explain the calculation?

subject: EDI Integration
body: We are switching our ERP to NetSuite. Does Harbor Analytics have a native connector, or do we need to rebuild the integration from scratch?

subject: Incorrect ETA on Route 4
body: Your system is predicting a 4-day delay for the Evergreen shipment, but the weather has cleared. Our internal team thinks it'll be on time. Where is your model pulling the delay data from?

subject: Password Reset Issue
body: One of our admins is locked out. They aren't receiving the password reset email. Checked spam already. Can you manually trigger a reset?

subject: Urgent: Data Discrepancy
body: Maya, looking at the Q3 summary Harbor generated vs. our internal spreadsheets. There's a 4% variance in 'Cost of Delay' metrics. We have a board meeting tomorrow and need to know which number is right.
